description: Codebase audit remediation — 106 findings across 4 phases: dead code cleanup, structural refactors, type safety improvements, and polish

userStories.title: Delete dead code, remove unused exports, fix stale comments
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove dead code and unused exports so the codebase is leaner and imports are accurate. Covers findings F-05, F-21, F-27, F-49, F-50, F-58, F-62, F-64, F-67, F-76, F-78, F-88.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete 12 unused Convex sync hook exports from sync.ts: useFluidLogs, useFluidLogsByRange, useDeleteFluidLog, useUpdateFluidLog, useSleepLogs, useSleepLogsByRange, useDeleteSleepLog, useUpdateSleepLog, useWeightLogs, useWeightLogsByRange, useDeleteWeightLog, useUpdateWeightLog (F-21). Also delete 2 unused types: SyncedFluidLog, SyncedSleepLog
Delete 7 unused store types from store.ts: FoodLogData, FluidLogData, DigestiveLogData, ActivityLogData, WeightLogData, ReproductiveLogData, LogEntryData (F-49)
Remove HEALTH_CONDITION_OPTIONS combined array export from store.ts — only the split arrays are used (F-50)
Remove 4 unused store actions from store.ts: getHabitLogsForRange, addFluidPreset, removeFluidPreset, clearPaneSummaryCache (F-62)

Remove 'export' keyword from 10 internal-only symbols across 8 files — PANE_CACHE_TTL_MS, PaneId, ConversationMessage, AiAnalysisResult, BristolOption, CelebrationEvent, VALID_INSIGHT_MODELS, DEPRECATED_HABIT_IDS, inferHabitType, getCompletedPeriodBounds (F-64)
Remove 3 deprecated re-exports: DEFAULT_AI_MODEL from aiAnalysis.ts, FOOD_PARSE_MODEL from foodParsing.ts, ActivitySection alias from ActivitySection.tsx (F-27)
Delete legacy CSS class .section-card from index.css (lines ~1123-1152) — zero consumers (F-76)
Delete unused FactorCorrelation type export from analysis.ts — FactorInsights.tsx is already deleted (F-78)
Delete unused landing page types: fadeLeft, fadeRight, fadeIn motion variants, ChakraKey, chakraGradient, SoundVariant, CelebrationConfig (F-88)
Fix stale JSDoc in useWeeklySummaryAutoTrigger.ts: change '18:00' to '21:00' to match BOUNDARY_HOUR = 21 (F-58)
Fix misleading 'legacy compatibility' comment on FluidLogData in store.ts — it is now the canonical format (F-67)
Clean up stale imports introduced by Round 1/2 habit consolidation: Track.tsx:188 unused import, HabitDetailSheet.tsx:25 and :28 unused imports, habitProgress.ts:30 unused import
Fix w-18! non-standard Tailwind syntax in FluidSection.tsx:113 — use canonical Tailwind (!w-18 or explicit width class)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in 11 atomic commits across 2 batches. F-21: SKIP (already deleted by prior work). F-49: SKIP (types now used by discriminated union from US-024). F-50: Removed HEALTH_CONDITION_OPTIONS from store.ts. F-62: Removed 4 unused store actions (getHabitLogsForRange, addFluidPreset, removeFluidPreset, clearPaneSummaryCache) from store.ts. F-64: Un-exported 9 internal-only symbols across 7 files (ConversationMessage, AiAnalysisResult in aiAnalysis.ts; PaneId, PANE_CACHE_TTL_MS in habitCoaching.ts; inferHabitType in habitTemplates.ts; VALID_INSIGHT_MODELS in aiModels.ts; BristolOption in BristolScale.tsx; CelebrationEvent in useCelebration.ts; getCompletedPeriodBounds in useWeeklySummaryAutoTrigger.ts). DEPRECATED_HABIT_IDS already deleted by US-031. F-27: Deleted DEFAULT_AI_MODEL re-export from aiAnalysis.ts, un-exported FOOD_PARSE_MODEL in foodParsing.ts, removed ActivitySection alias from ActivitySection.tsx. F-76: Deleted .section-card CSS from index.css. F-78: Un-exported FactorCorrelation in analysis.ts. F-88: Deleted fadeLeft/fadeRight/fadeIn from motionVariants.ts, deleted ChakraKey/chakraGradient from chakraColors.ts, un-exported SoundVariant in sounds.ts, un-exported CelebrationConfig in celebrations.ts. F-58: Fixed JSDoc 18:00→21:00 in useWeeklySummaryAutoTrigger.ts. F-67: SKIP (already fixed). Stale imports: Track.tsx and HabitDetailSheet.tsx already clean from prior work. Deleted deprecated formatNumber alias from habitProgress.ts. Fixed w-18!→!w-18 Tailwind syntax in FluidSection.tsx.

userStories.title: Create shared time and weight constants modules
userStories.description: As a developer, I need centralized time and weight conversion constants so magic numbers don't scatter across the codebase. Covers findings F-08, F-09.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/timeConstants.ts exporting MS_PER_MINUTE, MS_PER_HOUR, MS_PER_DAY, MS_PER_WEEK, HOURS_PER_DAY
Replace all inline time constant definitions in analysis.ts, aiAnalysis.ts, ObservationWindow.tsx, Track.tsx, useAiInsights.ts, store.ts with imports from timeConstants.ts (F-08)
Replace all inline 24*60*60*1000 calculations with MS_PER_DAY import
Add LBS_PER_KG = 2.20462 and KG_PER_LB = 0.45359237 constants to formatWeight.ts
Add kgToLbs(kg: number) and lbsToKg(lbs: number) helper functions to formatWeight.ts
Replace all bare 2.20462 and 0.45359237 literals across 5+ files with imports from formatWeight.ts (F-09)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/timeConstants.ts with MS_PER_MINUTE, MS_PER_HOUR, MS_PER_DAY, MS_PER_WEEK, HOURS_PER_DAY. Replaced inline time constants in analysis.ts, aiAnalysis.ts, ObservationWindow.tsx, Track.tsx, useAiInsights.ts, store.ts with imports. Added LBS_PER_KG, KG_PER_LB constants and kgToLbs/lbsToKg helpers to formatWeight.ts. Replaced bare weight literals across 6 files (ActivitySection, WeightTrendCard, TodayLog, WeightEntryDrawer, DemographicsSection, WeightSubRow). Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Adopt getErrorMessage utility and use shared OpenAI client
userStories.description: As a developer, I need consistent error handling and a single OpenAI client instance. Covers findings F-28, F-42.
acceptanceCriteria: Add optional fallback parameter to getErrorMessage in errors.ts
Replace 10+ inline 'err instanceof Error ? err.message : ...' patterns across the codebase with getErrorMessage() calls (F-28)
Replace 4 'catch (err: any)' locations with 'catch (err: unknown)' + getErrorMessage(err)
Use getOpenAIClient() in foodParsing.ts instead of creating a separate OpenAI client instance — gains caching (F-42)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added optional fallback parameter to getErrorMessage in errors.ts. Replaced 10 inline 'instanceof Error ? err.message : ...' patterns with getErrorMessage() calls across 6 files: PricingSection.tsx, SleepEntryDrawer.tsx, FluidSection.tsx, AiSuggestionsCard.tsx, WeightEntryDrawer.tsx, FoodSection.tsx. Changed 4 'catch (err: any)' to 'catch (err: unknown)' + getErrorMessage (Track.tsx x2, ActivitySection.tsx, useAiInsights.ts). foodParsing.ts already uses getOpenAIClient() from prior work. Typecheck passes.

Updated getDateKeyFromTimestamp and getTodayDateKey in reproductiveHealth.ts to delegate to formatLocalDateKey. Created src/lib/healthProfile.ts with normalizeHealthConditionName and normalizeHealthConditions utilities for health condition name normalization. Replaced inline normalization in store.ts migration and AppDataForm.tsx with normalizeHealthConditions import. Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Refactor analysis.ts factor correlation builders to config-driven pattern
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the 4 nearly identical factor correlation builder functions (~130 lines) in analysis.ts replaced with a generic config-driven builder. Covers findings F-43, F-80.
acceptanceCriteria: Create generic factor correlation builder function parameterized by partition config
Replace 4 repetitive builder functions (lines ~632-765) in analysis.ts with the generic builder (F-43)
Remove smoking correlation special-case early return that duplicates metric calculation (F-80)
All correlation calculations produce identical results to before
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Created generic buildFactorCorrelation function with FactorConfig interface. Config includes factor name, metric name, partitionDays function, and optional earlyReturn for special cases. Replaced 4 builder functions (buildWalkCorrelation, buildSmokingCorrelation, buildSleepCorrelation, buildFluidCorrelation) with calls to buildFactorCorrelation using appropriate configs. Smoking's special early return (no smoking data) handled via earlyReturn config. Reduced ~135 lines of nearly identical code to ~110 lines with DRY config-driven pattern. Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Define discriminated union types for LogEntry.data
userStories.description: As a developer, I need LogEntry.data typed with a proper discriminated union instead of 'any', so TypeScript can catch data shape errors. This is the foundation for removing ~25 downstream 'any' usages. Covers finding F-04 (partial).
acceptanceCriteria: Define discriminated union type for LogEntry.data keyed on LogType (food, fluid, digestive, activity, weight, sleep, habit, reproductive)
Each variant specifies the actual shape used at runtime (audit current read patterns first)
Update LogEntry type in store.ts to use the discriminated union instead of 'any'
Update SyncedLog type in sync.ts to match
Fix immediate type errors caused by the new typing in store.ts and sync.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Fixed all 53 type errors in TodayLog.tsx related to the discriminated union types for LogEntry.data:

Key Changes:

1. Added narrowed log type aliases in TodayLog.tsx:
◦  FoodLog, FluidLog, WeightLog, ReproductiveLog, DigestiveLog, HabitLog
2. Added helper functions:
◦  getLogNotes(log) - safely extracts notes from any log type that supports it
◦  hasNotes(log) and hasItems(log) - type guards for specific data shapes
3. Updated sub-row components to use narrowed types:
◦  FoodSubRow now takes entry: FoodLog
◦  FluidSubRow now takes entry: FluidLog 
◦  WeightSubRow now takes entry: WeightLog
◦  ReproductiveSubRow now takes entry: ReproductiveLog
4. Updated group types to use narrowed entries:
◦  FluidGroup.entries: FluidLog[]
◦  FoodGroup.entries: FoodLog[]
◦  WeightGroup.entries: WeightLog[]
◦  ReproductiveGroup.entries: ReproductiveLog[]
5. Added notes field to FluidLogData and WeightLogData in store.ts
6. Removed legacy fluidType fallbacks - using items[0].name consistently
7. Fixed CounterHabitRow and EventHabitRow to properly narrow habit data before accessing name and habitTypeThis is a large change. Audit aiAnalysis.ts, Track.tsx, TodayLog.tsx, and analysis.ts read patterns first to determine the correct shapes. Do NOT change downstream consumers yet — that is US-025 and US-026.

userStories.title: Unify inputSafety.ts between src/ and convex/
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the diverged inputSafety.ts files unified so security fixes propagate to both client and server. Covers finding F-03.
acceptanceCriteria: Determine shared module strategy: either a shared/ directory importable by both, or generate one from the other
Unify regex patterns and normalization logic between src/lib/inputSafety.ts and convex/lib/inputSafety.ts
Preserve Convex-specific additions (assertMaxLength, sanitizeRequiredText, INPUT_SAFETY_LIMITS, path tracking) in the Convex version
Shared core logic comes from a single source of truth
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Problem: src/lib/inputSafety.ts
  and convex/lib/inputSafety.ts   
  had diverged — different type
  definitions, the client had
  maxLength baked into          
  SanitizeTextOptions (unused in
  production), and the client's 
  sanitizeUnknownStringsDeep
  lacked path tracking and
  max-length enforcement.

  Strategy: Since Convex can't
  import from outside convex/,
  both files are kept but the core
   logic is now identical. The
  Convex version is the superset
  with server-only helpers.

  Changes:
  1. src/lib/inputSafety.ts —
  Rewrote to match Convex core:
  added INPUT_SAFETY_LIMITS,
  removed maxLength from
  SanitizeTextOptions, added path
  tracking + assertMaxLength to
  sanitizeUnknownStringsDeep
  2. convex/lib/inputSafety.ts —
  Added sync header comment
  (formatter also reformatted it
  consistently)
  3. src/lib/__tests__/inputSafety
  .test.ts — Removed obsolete
  maxLength test, added 2 new
  tests for path-aware error
  messages and custom
  maxStringLengthThis requires determining Convex's module sharing strategy. If Convex cannot import from src/, keep two files but extract shared constants/regex to a shared location importable by both.

userStories.title: Migrate Radix data attributes to Base UI equivalents

userStories.notes: Migrated 14 UI component files. Data attrs: accordion (data-[state=open]→data-[panel-open]), checkbox (data-[state=checked]→data-[checked] x4), switch (checked/unchecked x6), toggle (data-[state=on]→data-[pressed] x2), drawer/sheet/responsive-shell (data-[state=open]→data-[popup-open]), dropdown-menu/popover/tooltip/navigation-menu (popup-open + CSS vars). CSS vars: --radix-*-content-transform-origin→--popup-transform-origin, --radix-*-viewport-*→--popup-*. asChild→render prop: button.tsx, badge.tsx (backward-compat renderElement pattern). Not migrated: NavigationMenuIndicator data-[state=visible/hidden] (no Base UI equivalent). Files: accordion.tsx, checkbox.tsx, switch.tsx, toggle.tsx, drawer.tsx, sheet.tsx, dropdown-menu.tsx, popover.tsx, tooltip.tsx, navigation-menu.tsx, responsive-shell.tsx, field.tsx, button.tsx, badge.tsx
